raw_consumer_statement:
I had fraud activity on my account between XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. All purchases were reversed except for a XXXX XXXX subscription payment. 

I have continued to request the amount of {$25.00} be credited to the account w/o resolution. The last notification was received on XX/XX/XXXX stating it was resolved and I was responsible for it. I had it reopened and the resolution has not changed. 

I have contacted the credit card company ( Citibank ) and while they are going to check again, I do not believe the outcome will be satisfactory.
